productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Trx HG Blue Sports Shoes
description: Show your competition what fast looks like in these men's adidas f5 TRX FG soccer cleats. They have a highly visible, lightweight synthetic upper with the Traxion FG outsole that goes from flat-out speed to razor-sharp turns on firm ground. UpperSynthetic upper for light weight and easy cleaningAsymmetrical lacing and flat laces for larger kicking area and better ball contactFirm heel counter to give support to your heelRaised heel tab at back heel which protects the Achilles tendon and locks the shoe in placeSoft, mesh, cushioned collarDie-cut EVA insole for comfort and light weightAgion anti-microbial treatment in the insole stops odors and prevents bacterial and fungal growth with environmentally friendly technologyOutsoleLightweight Traxion outsole with fixed moulded cleatsOutsole is suitable for very hard and dry natural ground or cinder surfacesShoe careWash upper in cold water and air dryDon't expose the shoe to direct sunlight or heatDon't use solvent based care products or leather creams
